overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street during golden hour. The scene features moderate traffic with various vehicles passing by, pedestrians crossing the road, and a transition from a straight street view to an area with highway overpasses and large digital billboards. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality cinematic rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a walk along a city sidewalk next to a concrete barrier. The camera moves forward past a modern street lamp, with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance. A pink muscle car drives past on the road, and the warm golden hour lighting casts long shadows across the pavement.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking as a pedestrian crosses the street ahead. Multiple vehicles pass by including a brown sedan, white convertible, and a large military truck. The camera moves past the street lamp, and steam rises from a manhole cover on the road. The pedestrian finishes crossing as the camera approaches the intersection.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider urban area featuring massive highway overpasses on the left and large digital billboards. The camera continues walking along the sidewalk, passing by the overpass structure. A pedestrian in distinctive pink pants walks toward the camera, and various vehicles continue to pass on the road. The futuristic city skyline remains prominent in the background with neon signage visible on the towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a futuristic city sidewalk that evolves from a narrow street view into a sprawling urban intersection dominated by massive infrastructure. It begins beside a concrete barrier under warm golden hour light, gliding past a modern street lamp as a pink muscle car speeds by against a distant skyline. As the camera advances, the scene becomes more active with a pedestrian crossing the road and a stream of vehicles, including a white convertible and a military truck, passing through rising steam from a manhole cover. The environment then expands into a wider urban corridor, shifting focus toward towering highway overpasses and glowing digital billboards that frame the path. Finally, the camera passes a pedestrian in pink pants while the futuristic skyline remains prominent in the background, now accented by vibrant neon signage on the distant towers.
